Dialog.name: SYS_000_0_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 0}A rare treasure chest lies beyond the door. Taking the parts and gems to the antique shop can grant you an advantage when exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 0}With the energy released from the Monad door, you have now obtained the map information of both the current floor and the next floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 0}With the energy released from the Monad door, you have now obtained the map information of the current floor.[n]{f 1 1}
